response.justification: Bogdan brings 13+ years of polyglot software craftsmanship with strong fundamentals in TDD, distributed systems, and full-stack delivery, plus recent exposure to MCP code generators and agentic workflows at re:cinq. However, the resume shows limited depth in production GenAI systems, RAG architectures, vector databases, and cloud-native AI design — the core of this Staff FDE role. Worth a screening call to probe the depth of his current AI-agent work and customer-facing technical leadership experience.
strengths: Extensive full-stack engineering experience across TypeScript, Node.js, and multiple languages with strong craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD, pairing)
Recent hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Demonstrated technical leadership through workshops, talks, open-source platform (GISCollective), and mentoring activities
concerns: No explicit evidence of 8+ years building production AI/GenAI solutions — AI exposure appears recent (2025)
Missing demonstrated experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, and major cloud AI platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure AI services)
No clear customer-facing forward-deployed or technical discovery experience with enterprise stakeholders
